request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that while we're paying our fair share for NATO, some allies are still falling behind? Just last year, Germany's defense spending dipped below 1.5% of GDP, leaving critical gaps in our collective security. It's time we ask: should American taxpayers keep covering for allies who aren't holding up their end? #NATO #NationalSecurity
